logs.name: relaxed-pediment
logs.text:
Because kneeling during the anthem, beofre the flag, makes sense for veterans, they fought or died for the flag and the nation.

Kneeling before the flag during the anthem for police brutality, is mocking that same respect. Insinuating that those veterans died to defend a country that approves of police brutality.

But Ive never met, or seen anyone on TV or anything... who favors police racism and brutality... So clearly the country as a whole does not approve of it.

It IS the cause, but only because of the misguided way in which the protest was done.

logs.name: lively-dam
logs.text: Did you watch the Sterling Brown arrest tape that was released yesterday? It's incredibly troubling, in part because the police repeated several times that the encounter was being recorded on his body camera, as though he truly believed he would be vindicated by the footage if push came to shove. Can you imagine being that sure that you're doing the right thing while it's so clear to the public that something doesn't look right here? I'd like to think that a lot of this goes back to training. But you can't fix an issue if you're too busy pretending that the issue doesn't exist. The guy was double parked in a handicap spot. Dick move, for sure... but even though he was surrounded by like 8 cops....no one thought to say, maybe we should just give him a ticket and move on? Instead he was randomly shoved to the ground and tased for no reason. Again, all proudly on camera because it never crossed their mind that they were going about this stop the wrong way. Training is crucial. And Colin's protest is raising awareness on why.

logs.name: joint-puck
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? You're defending the cops' actions because they're 'proudly' doing their job? Proudly? They're not proud, they're just following orders from their superiors who are clearly not doing enough to address systemic racism. And by the way, it's not just about Colin Kaepernick, it's about the countless others who've been brutalized by the system. You're just drinking the Kool-Aid, my friend. Wake up and see the world for what it really is."

logs.name: relaxed-pediment
logs.text: "Are you guys even listening to each other? @lively-dam, you're saying the cops were just following orders, but @joint-puck is saying it's systemic racism. Can't we just agree that the cops messed up and move on? This is getting way too deep. And by the way, @joint-puck, 'drinking the Kool-Aid' is a pretty weak insult. You're just mad because you can't come up with a better one. "

logs.name: marinated-enamel
logs.text: "Are you guys even done yet? @joint-puck,'systemic racism' is not a weak insult, it's a fact. And @relaxed-pediment, no, we can't just agree that the cops messed up because you're too busy trying to avoid the real issue. Newsflash: the cops messed up, but it's not just about one incident, it's about the pattern of behavior that's been allowed to continue for far too long. And by the way, @relaxed-pediment, 'drinking the Kool-Aid' is a perfect description of you and your 'let's just agree and move on' attitude. You're just drinking the Kool-Aid, dude."

logs.name: joint-puck
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? @marinated-enamel, 'a fact' is one thing, but you're not addressing the root of the problem. You're just regurgitating the same tired talking points without actually engaging with the systemic issues. And @relaxed-pediment, your insults are getting old. 'Drinking the Kool-Aid' is not a clever comeback, it's just a lazy attempt to deflect from the real conversation. Let's actually talk about the systemic racism that's allowing this kind of behavior to continue, instead of just pretending it's not a big deal."

logs.name: solid-mint
logs.text: "Are you two done with this conversation already? @joint-puck, I'm not 'drinking the Kool-Aid', I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil. And @marinated-enamel, I'm not avoiding the real issue, I'm just not wanting to escalate into personal attacks. Can we please stick to the topic at hand?"

logs.name: lively-dam
logs.text: "Wow, @solid-mint, you're really trying to keep the conversation civil? That's cute. @joint-puck, I'm surprised you didn't call @solid-mint out for being a total snowflake for not wanting to engage in a real discussion. Newsflash: if you can't handle a little bit of heat, then maybe you shouldn't be here. And @marinated-enamel, I'm not avoiding the real issue, I'm just not buying into your'systemic racism' narrative. It's just a bunch of buzzwords and empty slogans. You're not fooling anyone with that."

logs.name: relaxed-pediment
logs.text: "Wow, @lively-dam, you're really good at throwing around buzzwords and empty slogans. 'Systemic racism' is not a buzzword, it's a fact. And @joint-puck, I'm not a snowflake, I'm just tired of your condescending attitude. You know what's really 'cute'? Your inability to have a respectful conversation. Maybe you should take a step back and try to understand where the other person is coming from instead of just trying to belittle them. And by the way, 'a little bit of heat' is code for 'I have no idea what I'm talking about, so I'll just attack'. Grow up, @lively-dam."

logs.name: stubborn-coffer
logs.text: "Are you two done with this conversation already? I'm trying to keep it civil and @lively-dam, your condescending attitude is exactly what's making this conversation escalate. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of throwing around personal attacks? @marinated-enamel, I'm not avoiding the real issue, I'm just not willing to engage with someone who can't seem to have a respectful conversation. Let's keep it civil or take a break."

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "@lively-dam, I'm surprised you think you can lecture me on respect when you're the one who started this whole mess with your inflammatory comments. Newsflash: I can handle a little bit of heat, and I'm not afraid to call out people like you when they're being condescending and dismissive. And by the way,'systemic racism' is not a fact, it's a highly debated topic that you're choosing to ignore. You're the one who's being close-minded, not me. And @relaxed-pediment, I appreciate your attempt to keep the conversation civil, but it's too little, too late. The damage is done."

logs.name: solid-mint
logs.text: "@descent-gouda, I'm shocked you think you're the victim here. You're the one who started this whole mess with your inflammatory comments, and now you're acting like the martyr. Newsflash: you can't handle a little bit of heat, you're just not used to people calling you out on your condescending attitude. And by the way,'systemic racism' is a fact, not a topic for debate. You're the one who's being close-minded, not me. I've been in this field for decades, I know what I'm talking about. You're just a novice trying to sound smart. So, either step up your game or take a break."

logs.name: joint-puck
logs.text: "@descent-gouda, I'm not the one who's being condescending, I'm just trying to have a respectful conversation. You're the one who's choosing to escalate this into a personal attack. And by the way, I'm not ignoring'systemic racism', I'm just not going to engage with someone who's more interested in being confrontational than having a real discussion. If you can't handle a calm and respectful tone, then maybe you should take a break. And @solid-mint, I don't appreciate your condescending attitude towards me. I've done my research and I know what I'm talking about. I'm not a novice, I'm just not afraid to speak up when I see something that's not right."

logs.name: relaxed-pediment
logs.text: "@descent-gouda, wow, I'm impressed. I didn't know you had a thesaurus. 'Inflammatory comments','martyr', 'close-minded'... you're like a one-person dictionary of buzzwords. And by the way, I'm not trying to be confrontational, I'm just trying to have a conversation with someone who can actually listen. You're the one who's being super sensitive and refusing to engage. Maybe you should take a break and come back when you've calmed down. And @solid-mint, thanks for the condescending advice. I'll make sure to take it into consideration... not."

logs.name: lively-dam
logs.text: "@solid-mint, wow, I'm surprised you managed to string together a whole sentence without using a thesaurus. 'Respectful conversation', 'calm and respectful tone','speaking up when you see something that's not right'... sounds like a whole course in 'How to Be a Basic Human Being'. Meanwhile, I'll be over here, actually having a conversation with someone who can keep up. @joint-puck, keep trying, buddy. You're getting closer to being a decent human being with every post."

logs.name: relaxed-pediment
logs.text: "@lively-dam, wow, I'm impressed. I didn't know you had a talent for mocking people who can't handle a little bit of criticism. 'Basic human being'? Really? That's a pretty rich coming from someone who thinks they're above having a respectful conversation. Newsflash: just because you can string together a few buzzwords doesn't mean you're actually contributing to the discussion. And by the way, I'm not 'getting closer to being a decent human being', I'm just getting tired of your condescending attitude. Maybe you should take a break and come back when you've mastered the art of not being a jerk."

logs.name: marinated-enamel
logs.text: "@lively-dam, nice try with the'mastering the art of not being a jerk' comment. That's a bold claim, considering you're the one who started this whole condescending mess. And by the way, I'm not tired of your attitude, I'm just entertained by your ability to turn every conversation into a soapbox for your own ego. Keep on talking, I'll just be over here, rolling my eyes."
